---
pagetitle: "Muller Chen Blog"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents:
      - posts/**/*.qmd
    exclude:
      filename: "index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 6
    type: grid
    fields: [date, title, description]
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

::: {.hero}
# Muller Chen Blog

在因果推論與機器學習的交界處寫筆記——記錄 Causal ML 的閱讀心得，以及 AI 工具如何重塑研究工作流。
:::

::: {.home-categories}
[AI 工具](posts/ai-tools/index.qmd)
[Causal Inference](posts/causalml/index.qmd)
[論文筆記](posts/paper-notes/index.qmd)
:::

## 最新文章

:::{#recent-posts}
:::
